check_content_excerpt:
Determine whether there is a host based intrusion detection and prevention service on each server. 

This requirement is not applicable on a system that has the role as the IDPS. However, this exception must be documented with the information system security officer (ISSO).

If a host-based IDPS is not installed on the system, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Install a host-based IDPS on each server.
title: Windows Server 2025 must have a host-based intrusion detection and prevention service (IDPS) installed.
